retry_reason: Failure occurs only when the session does not exist (out of bounds or NULL slot). Retrying will not create the session; the caller must handle the absence appropriately.
contract_summary: This function looks up an MDS session by index and, if found, acquires a reference (via ceph_get_mds_session) and returns it to the caller. If the session does not exist (index out of bounds or NULL slot), it returns NULL. The caller must hold appropriate locks (typically mdsc->mutex) to prevent concurrent session removal. The caller must check the return value and, if non-NULL, must later release the reference with ceph_put_mds_session. The function does not transfer ownership of the session array entry; it only provides a reference to the caller.
